name: Abish (Ethiopia)
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon butter with 1 tbsp. chopped parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a pan and sauté onion until golden.
2. Stir in ginger, garlic, tomatoes, minced beef, and salt.
3. Cook on low heat for 15-20 minutes, stirring regularly to prevent burning.
4. Combine eggs with the mixture in the pan and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
5. Remove from heat.
6. Add turmeric and seasoned butter to the mixture.
7. Top with parsley and goat's cheese (if using).
8. Serve with rice or fresh bread; mix with steamed corn and eat by itself; or use it to stuff other vegetables.
